assets.alt: Flat head-on liquid-glass evaluation panel on a soft green and mint mesh background
assets.caption: Impressions show reach. A stronger measurement model tracks whether the right buyers engage, trust, reuse, search for, or act on the expertise.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1897x829 landscape crop
Source context from article: B2B teams should measure employee-generated content in layers: reach, buyer-fit engagement, conversation quality, pipeline influence, sales reuse, and search or AI visibility. Impressions stay in the report, but they should not be treated as the outcome. The business question is whether the right buyers saw, trusted, used, replied to, searched for, cited, or moved closer to a sales conversation because of the content.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from that article context: measuring quality beyond surface reach. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: one front-facing flat liquid-glass evaluation panel with a small check/quality marker. No dashboard, no chart, no numbers.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1897x829. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. All glass/white graphics must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only soft green and mint. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: One front-facing flat liquid-glass evaluation panel with three sparse non-readable rows and one simple check or quality marker. No numbers, no bars, no line chart, no analytics dashboard.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, numbers, charts, line graphs, bar graphs, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
